case_title: BONDARENKO DON VS RANGE JOHN A AKA DORSEY TONY AKA ROGUE TONEE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RANGE JOHN A AKA DORSEY TONY AKA ROGUE TONEE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY BONDARENKO DON AS TO DEFENDANT RANGE JOHN A AKA DORSEY TONY AKA ROGUE TONEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONDARENKO DON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGE JOHN A AKA DORSEY TONY AKA ROGUE TONEE $486.55 PRINCIPAL, $35.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $521.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
